About Me

Hi, I'm Yazaan — a Designer Who Gets Results.

I'm a UI/UX and graphic designer passionate about building visually powerful, user-friendly designs. Whether it's a sleek mobile app, a brand identity, or a social media campaign — I bring ideas to life with clarity and creativity.

I've worked with clients across Pakistan and internationally, delivering on-time, high-quality work that speaks for itself. My approach is simple: understand the client's goal, then design something that actually achieves it.

UI/UX Design Branding Social Media Web Design Print Design Exhibition Design Figma Photoshop Illustrator

Portfolio

Selected Work

Real projects. Real problems solved through design.

01
Al-Ahmed Rice & Agro Exports — Full Website
Web DesignUI/UXWordPress

A Pakistani rice export company needed a professional multi-page website to attract international buyers. Designed Home, About, Products, Infrastructure, Clients, and Contact pages — all with a premium green & gold aesthetic.

Problem
No web presence, losing international export clients
Solution
7-page professional website with full product catalog
Tools
Figma, WordPress, Photoshop
02
Fitness Center — Full Exhibition Brand Kit
BrandingPrint DesignExhibition

A gym needed a complete event presence for a local fitness expo. Created a dark, high-energy brand identity with booth tent, roll-up banner, tablecloth, and teardrop flag — all consistent and print-ready.

Problem
No marketing materials for public exhibitions
Solution
Full expo kit: tent, banner, flag, tablecloth
Tools
Photoshop, Illustrator
03
Restaurant — Roll-Up Banner & Social Ads
Print DesignSocial MediaPhotoshop

Designed a bold roll-up banner for a restaurant storefront plus matching social media ad variants — consistent visual identity from street to screen with a 20% discount call-to-action.

Problem
Low foot traffic and no social media ads
Solution
Print banner + matching digital ad set
Tools
Photoshop, Illustrator
04
Branded Tablecloth & Event Mockups
Print DesignMockupBranding

Professional branded tablecloth design for events and exhibitions, plus supporting event display mockups — clean, corporate, and print-ready.

Solution
Print-ready tablecloth + display mockups

Photoshop, Illustrator
05
Social Media Ads + Personal Brand Card

3-variant ad set + personal brand identity card
